statement.headerDoc:
STEP Batch 4 — Prime sub-problems: finite verifications
  =========================================================

  Each section: known examples of a particular prime family.
  Infinitude of each family is open.

  1. Factorial primes (n! ± 1)
  2. Regular primes (p ∤ numerator of Bernoulli B_{2k} for 2k ≤ p-3)
  3. Palindrome primes
  4. Repunit primes (R_n = (10^n - 1)/9 prime)
  5. Pell primes
  6. n² + 1 primes
  7. Triple primes (p, p+2, p+6)
  8. Happy primes
  9. Lucas primes
  10. Pierpont primes (2^a · 3^b + 1)
  11. Thabit primes (3 · 2^n - 1)

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
